summary:

Ensuring balance between comfort and effectiveness ensures better patient satisfaction and outcome durability. ```
To summarize concisely:

Balancing minimum irritation with excellent fit and aesthetics makes Option C highly suitable; hence it addresses contemporary issues concerning pontic design effectively. Maintaining this equilibrium enhances both short-and-long term results significantly. ```

Final summary reduced to two sentences capturing essential elements clearly without extraneous details or repetitions.
